Our Story

A cozy corner of Addis, brewed with heart

Mandy Coffee is a cozy neighborhood café serving carefully crafted Ethiopian coffee, fresh snacks, samosas, smoothies, and refreshing drinks in the heart of Addis Ababa.

Whether you're grabbing your morning espresso or meeting friends for an afternoon coffee, Mandy Coffee offers a warm atmosphere and exceptional hospitality — proudly women-owned and rooted in authentic Ethiopian coffee culture.

  • ✓ Specialty Ethiopian beans
  • ✓ Warm community hospitality
  • ✓ Freshly crafted, every day
Our Menu

Crafted to be savored

From silky iced coffee to fresh mocktails and homemade cakes — every item is made fresh with care.

100 Br

Iced Latte

Chilled espresso layered with silky milk and a soft foam top.

130 Br

Chocolate Marshmallow Mocha

Iced mocha swirled with chocolate and topped with fluffy marshmallows.

140 Br

Oreo Coffee Shake

Blended cold coffee with crushed Oreo, topped with a whole cookie.

85 Br

Iced Coffee

Bold cold coffee over ice, clean and refreshing.

90 Br

Mint Lemonade

Fresh lemon and mint muddled with sparkling soda, served tall.

95 Br

Strawberry Mint Cooler

Strawberries and mint steeped in a citrus splash, served over ice.

100 Br

Tropical Berry Splash

Strawberry and citrus layered over crushed ice with fresh mint.

110 Br

Mango Sunrise

Fresh mango blended smooth with a citrus swirl.

105 Br

Berry Beet Cooler

Fresh beet and berry juice with a bright citrus twist, served chilled.

100 Br

Strawberry Mojito

Muddled strawberries, mint, and lime over crushed ice.

90 Br

Chocolate Fudge Cake

Rich, dense chocolate cake finished with a glossy ganache.

70 Br

Marble Butter Cake

Classic vanilla and chocolate marble, baked fresh daily.

65 Br

Chocolate Croissant

Buttery, flaky croissant drizzled with warm chocolate.

Ask us

Celebration Cakes

Custom cakes for birthdays and special occasions, made to order.
